reviews.author: Amulya Reddy
reviews.review_body: Sanskriti School has provided a wonderful learning experience. My child has been studying here since Grade 1 and is now in Grade 7. The teachers are dedicated, the environment is supportive, and the school focuses equally on academics and overall development. We’re happy with the growth and confidence our child has gained over the years.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: I liked everything about this school

reviews.author: Parvatareddy Triveni
reviews.review_body: Only blow their own trumpet about vacancies and salaries but they pay only 20000 for any position. Worst management always runs after money.no values & Ethics. Positive reviews are also from teachers forcibly posted by management.

reviews.author: sudha ram
reviews.review_body: If people want to join sanskriti I highly recommend not to join your child in this school.my child is recently having lakhs of fees ,and I don't know why nobody posted about the bathrooms 😔 cause it's very dirty.so WORST SCHOOL EVER😭😠.

reviews.author: Ramachandra Srinavas
reviews.review_body:
very nice school 😁my child has been in this school for over 5
years .And has also been correcting  my English.love this school!

reviews.author: BeenaRajeah
reviews.review_body:
Thank you

Dear Ma’am,

As we bid farewell due to our relocation to Noida, we want to express our sincere thanks to the you and the School Management for providing a highly enriching environment that helped my son to develop interest in subjects. This remarkable journey of my son under your guidance was a great learning experience for him. We appreciate the care and personal attention you have given to Harshil that helped him in his academic endeavours and fostering higher moral values. In these two year of his stay in Sanskriti School, we noticed improvements in both the studies as well as extracurricular activities, which has laid down a strong foundation towards enabling him to become a good human being. We along with Harshil, will always cherish the memories that has been created herein.
Thank you for being more than teachers, instead a mentor and shaper of character. We are grateful for the collective efforts of the entire staffs of Sanskriti School in providing a holistic education which extends beyond any textbooks.
Wishing you and Sanskriti School a continued success in nurturing future generations.

With heartfelt thanks,
Harshil's parents
Student
HARSHIL MISHRA

reviews.author: Priyam Das
reviews.review_body: Wish I could give  zero star,unfortunately no option so giving 1 star .The school is pathetic...Worst school, worst teachers snd management...no heigyne,no safety measures are taken for small kids.The fees is alsow quite high compared to the education/service they are offering.Don't even think to put your kid in Sanskriti School,Kondapur branch.

reviews.author: Suresh Kumar M
reviews.review_body: Some of the teachers behaviour is reduculus and sometimes you will feel they purposely torture in the names of trivial rules...they make you inconvinient and want to show they are strict....please respect parents who genunly approch you in emergencies and dont behave rude...attitude of couple of teachers are very bad and they need some orientation by the principal
